title: Introducing: The Adobe Creative Cloud Integration!
excerpt: Are you a designer using Adobe?  Do you ever wish you could manage your whole design flow without ever leaving Adobe Creative Cloud?  You can now instantly receive all the information about your incoming creative designs…

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you a designer using Adobe? Do you ever wish you could manage your whole design flow without ever leaving Adobe Creative Cloud? You can now instantly receive all the information about your incoming creative designs with our new Adobe Creative Cloud integration!

3.gif1600×900 448 KB

You can learn all about the integration and how to get started here! Feel free to send us any feedback you have by filling out this form, we are always looking for ways to improve. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to support@monday.com.

posts.author: dha77 (dha jones)
posts.cookedHtml: With this adobe creative cloud integration I was having issues while sharing the network printing feature. If you are also facing the same issue then go to Airways Printing

posts.author: cracuff (crystal walters)
posts.cookedHtml: I am new here & I am trying to get my creative team trained on using the integration so I am working on a test job for creative. When I open my integration within InDesign & other programs I don’t see action items for me to work on. When I tested out the demo I had tasks and action items that needed my attention. I’m not seeing that now that I have the full version.
